scripts.build: bun run --filter @geometra/core build && bun run --filter @geometra/renderer-canvas build && bun run --filter @geometra/renderer-terminal build && bun run --filter @geometra/renderer-webgpu build && bun run --filter @geometra/server build && bun run --filter @geometra/client build && bun run --filter @geometra/ui build && bun run --filter @geometra/router build
scripts.test:all: vitest run --config vitest.fast.config.ts && vitest run packages/core/src/__tests__/fonts.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/virtual-scroll.test.ts && vitest run packages/core/src/__tests__/perf-smoke.test.ts packages/server/src/__tests__/protocol-perf-smoke.test.ts
scripts.release:gate: vitest run packages/core/src/__tests__/keyboard.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/text-input.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/text-input-history.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/a11y.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/seo.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/selection.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/hit-test.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/fonts.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/direction.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/virtual-scroll.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/focus-trap.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/app-layout-timing.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/tree.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/signals.test.ts packages/router/src/__tests__/query.test.ts packages/router/src/__tests__/path.test.ts packages/router/src/__tests__/matcher.test.ts packages/router/src/__tests__/history.test.ts packages/server/src/__tests__/binary-frame.test.ts packages/renderer-terminal/src/__tests__/renderer-smoke.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/perf-smoke.test.ts packages/server/src/__tests__/protocol-perf-smoke.test.ts packages/core/src/__tests__/geometry-snapshot-ci.test.ts && bun run test:terminal-input
